hub.title: Unity Hub Patch
hub.desc: Hub config patch + license file checks

hub.cert_patch_desc: Replace System.Security.Cryptography.Xml.dll to bypass signature verification

hub.license_missing_signature: Unity_lic.ulf is missing the Signature node. Unity Licensing Client logs this as Missing Signature node and processes 0 license files.
hub.unihacker_method_step3: No PEM certificate or IL code modification needed
